items.name_en: New Release 🆕Chanel 25s Spring/Summer
items.name_cn:
New Release 🆕Chanel 25s Spring/Summer
Cross-handle Mini Kelly Black
Purchased from the counter for 31,800 RMB~
Bestseller Reissue 🔥 New version Mini Kelly horizontal
When Chanel's legendary aesthetics meet exquisite craftsmanship,
this cross-chain handle Mini Kelly was born.
With a unique design, it has an elegant handbag feel,
and can be casually crossbody, unlocking diverse fashion looks~
Hardware: Thick-plated 14k pale gold clasp
Material: Impala "Three Sheep" small ball pattern
Dimensions: 10*18*4.5 cm

items.name_en: M14098 White Color Full Steel Hardware! Chip Version, Phone Pouch Métis! The unique reproduction series Phone Pouch Métis is crafted in colored Monogram coated canvas, injecting vitality into this daily essential. The bag's flap design is specifically for storing smartphones and keys, paired with silver riveted corner guards and S-lock closure, paying tribute to the brand's iconic hard suitcase elements. The bag comes with a detachable chain strap for multiple carrying options.

items.name_en: New Arrival 🌸M13263 Cherry. This Neverfull Medium handbag reinterprets the playful elements of the x Murakami Re-Imagined series with dynamic brushstrokes, placing the sweet cherry pattern on Monogram coated canvas, while the striking striped lining echoes the artist's signature color aesthetic. Calfskin trim completes the classic style. Detailed Features - 31* × 14 × 28cm.
items.name_cn: New Arrival 🌸M13263 Cherry. This Neverfull Medium handbag reinterprets the playful elements of the x Murakami Re-Imagined series with dynamic brushstrokes, placing the sweet cherry pattern on Monogram coated canvas, while the striking striped lining echoes the artist's signature color aesthetic. Calfskin trim completes the classic style. Detailed Features - 31* × 14 × 28cm.

specs.rawTitle: New Arrival 🌸M13263 Cherry. This Neverfull Medium handbag reinterprets the playful elements of the x Murakami Re-Imagined series with dynamic brushstrokes, placing the sweet cherry pattern on Monogram coated canvas, while the striking striped lining echoes the artist's signature color aesthetic. Calfskin trim completes the classic style. Detailed Features - 31* × 14 × 28cm.

items.name_en: New Arrival M14238 [Speedy Soft 30 Handbag] M14238 White Flower/Cherry. Encounter the unique aesthetics of the x Murakami Re-Imagined series. The Monogram coated canvas features a clean color palette to highlight the brilliant and passionate cherry pattern by the Japanese artist. The denim construction forms the inner layer, while the Toron top handle and detachable Toron shoulder strap are crafted from leather, and the bow-shaped key case adds rich details. Detailed Features - 17 x 30 x 21 cm.
items.name_cn: New Arrival M14238 [Speedy Soft 30 Handbag] M14238 White Flower/Cherry. Encounter the unique aesthetics of the x Murakami Re-Imagined series. The Monogram coated canvas features a clean color palette to highlight the brilliant and passionate cherry pattern by the Japanese artist. The denim construction forms the inner layer, while the Toron top handle and detachable Toron shoulder strap are crafted from leather, and the bow-shaped key case adds rich details. specs.rawTitle: New Arrival M14238 [Speedy Soft 30 Handbag] M14238 White Flower/Cherry. Encounter the unique aesthetics of the x Murakami Re-Imagined series. The denim construction forms the inner layer, while the Toron top handle and detachable Toron shoulder strap are crafted from leather, and the bow-shaped key case adds rich details. items.name_en: New Arrival M14231 [Lx TM Pochette Métis East West Handbag] M14231 Cherry. This Pochette Métis East West handbag is from the x Murakami Re-Imagined series, dyeing the Monogram coated canvas in soft new-season tones that complement the sweet cherry pattern in the artist's work. The glossy S-lock buckle lights up the overall design, and the exquisite structure features multiple compartments, making it an elegant choice for daily travel. Detailed Features - 13.5 x 6 x 21.5 cm
items.name_cn: New Arrival M14231 [Lx TM Pochette Métis East West Handbag] M14231 Cherry. This Pochette Métis East West handbag is from the x Murakami Re-Imagined series, dyeing the Monogram coated canvas in soft new-season tones that complement the sweet cherry pattern in the artist's work. The glossy S-lock buckle lights up the overall design, and the exquisite structure features multiple compartments, making it an elegant choice for daily travel. Detailed Features - 13.5 x 6 x 21.5 cm

items.name_en: Premium 163c01 Dynamic Chip. This Speedy Bandoulière 25 handbag draws inspiration from the Express bag launched by the brand in 1930, featuring a delicate structure crafted from Monogram Empreinte leather, cleverly using a deep background to highlight the large Monogram embossed pattern. Dazzling metalware and bright linings highlight exquisite details, with a top handle and a detachable and adjustable strap. Model: M58947. Leather: Italian Grade A leather. Hardware: Imported Grade A all-steel hardware. Packaging: Full set of original MB packaging. Dimensions: 25.0 x 19.0 x 15.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Premium 163c01 Dynamic Chip. This Speedy series is from the Louis Vuitton x Murakami Re-edition series, cleverly incorporating the bright tones of the Japanese artist into the Monogram coated canvas. Calfskin trim outlines the close-fitting structure, and the nameplate is embellished with an elegant bow detail. Model: M13085. Leather: Italian Grade A leather. Hardware: Imported Grade A all-steel hardware. Packaging: Full set of original MB packaging. Dimensions: 25.0 x 19.0 x 15.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: M13094 Monogram Cherry Blossom. This Speedy Bandouliere handbag features classic Monogram coated canvas, illuminated by the sweet cherry blossom pattern from the Takashi Murakami Reproduction series. Crafted with refined leather, it includes a Toron top handle, a detachable shoulder strap, and a Murakami key pouch. The compact size easily accommodates daily essentials like a phone and long wallet. Dimensions: 20.5*12*13cm.

items.name_en: M14239 White Flower Cherry Blossom (M81911). This Wallet On Chain Ivy handbag continues the narrative of the 2000s, playfully joining the Takashi Murakami Reproduction series. The Monogram canvas subtly highlights the vibrant colors of the cherry pattern, fully releasing the artist's kawaii power. Leather shoulder strap and chain allow for shoulder carrying. Dimensions: 23.5*4.3*12cm.

items.name_en: M13994 Blue Denim Cherry Blossom 🍒. The Pochette Accessoires handbag joins the Takashi Murakami Reproduction series. Monogram denim canvas highlights the bright embroidery of the cherry pattern, interpreting the artist's playful aesthetic. Leather trim and shiny metal hardware enrich the details. Dimensions: 22*4*13cm. (Excludes doll)
